title: berlinia confusa
intro: Berlinia confusa is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae, commonly known as the African bush mango or African mango tree. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Berlinia confusa include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and heart disease. Herbal preparations of Berlinia confusa include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
